title: FarmToTable
description: FarmToTable expands Minecraft’s farming and food systems, bringing agriculture one step closer to real cooking and food production.
body:
FarmToTable expands Minecraft’s farming and food systems, bringing agriculture one step closer to real cooking and food production.

With this mod, you can grow new crops such as onions, lettuce, and tomatoes, each with their own growth stages, seeds, and harvest mechanics. Farming becomes more rewarding as crops mature visually and yield different amounts depending on their growth.

FarmToTable also introduces new food ingredients and kitchen items, allowing you to combine fresh vegetables into more complex meals. From basic ingredients to complete dishes, food progression feels more natural and immersive.

Grow tomatoes, lettuce, and onions, trade crops with merchants, and buy Golden Onions in return. Craft burgers and pork sandwiches — a powerful and delicious food source — and brew healing potions straight from the farm to your table.

The mod focuses on:

🌱 New crops and seeds with custom growth stages

🧅 Harvestable vegetables used as cooking ingredients

🔪 Kitchen tools and food items inspired by real-life cooking

🍔 Craftable meals made from farmed ingredients

🎮 A vanilla-friendly experience that fits naturally into Minecraft

Grow new crops, craft **Golden Onions**, and brew powerful healing potions — straight from the farm to your table.

FarmToTable is designed to integrate seamlessly with the base game, enhancing farming without overcomplicating gameplay. Grow, harvest, cook, and enjoy a richer survival experience — from the farm straight to your table.
